ucs.title: [LLM] Silent Librarian (COBALT DICKENS) cloned university-library login phishing — clicks to look-alike SSO/EZproxy/Shibboleth domains
ucs.description: Hunts for users clicking links to recently-registered look-alike domains spoofing university library / SSO / EZproxy / Shibboleth portals — the signature initial-access vector of Silent Librarian / TA407 / Mabna Institute, who repeatedly clone academic library login pages to harvest credentials of researchers and faculty.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Web.url) as url values(Web.user) as user values(Web.src) as src from datamodel=Web where Web.action=allowed Web.http_method IN ("GET","POST") by Web.dest Web.url_domain Web.user | rename Web.* as * | rex field=url_domain "(?<reg_domain>[^\.]+\.[^\.]+)$" | search url_domain IN ("*library*","*ezproxy*","*shibboleth*","*sso-*","*-sso*","*login*","*idp*","*webmail*","*outlook*") url_domain!="*.edu" url_domain!="*.ac.*" url_domain!="*.gov" | eval univ_brand=case(match(url_domain,"(?i)cornell|columbia|stanford|berkeley|mit|harvard|princeton|yale|ucla|nyu|umich|virginia|imperial|cambridge|oxford|ucl|kcl|toronto|mcgill|monash|sydney|melbourne"),"yes",1=1,"no") | where univ_brand="yes" | join type=left reg_domain [ | inputlookup whois_lookup | eval reg_domain=lower(domain) | eval domain_age_days=(now()-creation_date)/86400 | fields reg_domain domain_age_days registrar ] | where (isnull(domain_age_days) OR domain_age_days < 90) | stats count min(firstTime) as firstSeen max(lastTime) as lastSeen values(url) as urls values(user) as users values(src) as sources by url_domain reg_domain domain_age_days registrar | `security_content_ctime(firstSeen)` | `security_content_ctime(lastSeen)` | sort - count
ucs.kql:
let UniBrandRegex = @"(?i)cornell|columbia|stanford|berkeley|mit|harvard|princeton|yale|ucla|nyu|umich|virginia|imperial|cambridge|oxford|ucl|kcl|toronto|mcgill|monash|sydney|melbourne|ethz|epfl";
let LibTermsRegex = @"(?i)library|ezproxy|shibboleth|sso[-.]|[-.]sso|idp[-.]|login|webmail|outlook|office365|o365";
let LegitTLDs = dynamic([".edu",".ac.uk",".ac.",".gov",".edu.au",".edu.cn"]);
UrlClickEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where ActionType == "ClickAllowed" or ActionType == "Click"
| extend host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(Url).Host))
| where host matches regex LibTermsRegex
| where host matches regex UniBrandRegex
| where not(host has_any (LegitTLDs))
| extend regDomain = strcat(tostring(split(host,".")[array_length(split(host,"."))-2]),".",tostring(split(host,".")[array_length(split(host,"."))-1]))
| join kind=inner (
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where RemoteUrl matches regex LibTermsRegex
    | project DeviceNameNet=DeviceName, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, InitiatingProcessFileName, NetTime=Timestamp
) on $left.host == $right.RemoteUrl
| summarize Clicks=count(), FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp), Users=make_set(AccountUpn,25), Devices=make_set(DeviceNameNet,25), URLs=make_set(Url,10) by host, regDomain
| extend HuntNote = "Possible Silent Librarian / TA407 cloned library/SSO portal"
| order by Clicks desc
ucs.rationale: Silent Librarian's defining tradecraft (documented by DOJ 2018 indictment, Secureworks, PhishLabs, and Malwarebytes) is registering look-alike domains that imitate the EZproxy, Shibboleth, and library-login portals of named universities, then phishing faculty/researchers. The combination of (a) university brand string, (b) library/SSO term, (c) domain age <90d, and (d) non-academic TLD is uniquely

ucs.title: [LLM] Silent Librarian post-compromise mailbox access — anomalous inbox forwarding/auto-redirect after foreign sign-in to academic tenants
ucs.description: Detects the post-credential-theft phase of Silent Librarian: a successful Azure AD / M365 sign-in from an Iran-adjacent ASN or unfamiliar geography to a faculty/researcher account, immediately followed by creation of an inbox forwarding or mail-redirect rule used to silently exfiltrate research correspondence (T1114.003).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Authentication.src) as src values(Authentication.src_country) as country values(Authentication.app) as app from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success Authentication.signature_id IN ("UserLoggedIn","InteractiveLogin") by Authentication.user Authentication.src_country _time span=1h | rename Authentication.* as * | eval risky_geo=if(match(country,"(?i)Iran|Iraq|Syria|Lebanon|Russia|Turkey|UAE") OR isnull(country),1,0) | where risky_geo=1 | join type=inner user [ search index=o365 (Operation="New-InboxRule" OR Operation="Set-InboxRule" OR Operation="Set-Mailbox" OR Operation="UpdateInboxRules") (Parameters="*ForwardTo*" OR Parameters="*RedirectTo*" OR Parameters="*ForwardingSmtpAddress*" OR Parameters="*DeleteMessage*" OR Parameters="*MoveToFolder*RSS*" OR Parameters="*MoveToFolder*Deleted*") | rename UserId as user | eval rule_time=_time | fields user rule_time Operation Parameters ClientIP ] | eval delta=abs(rule_time-lastTime) | where delta < 3600 | table firstTime lastTime user country src app rule_time Operation Parameters ClientIP | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let RiskyGeo = dynamic(["IR","IQ","SY","LB","RU","TR","AE"]);
let SuspectLogins =
    AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | where Country in (RiskyGeo) or isempty(Country)
    | where Application has_any ("Office 365","Exchange","Outlook","OWA")
    | project LoginTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn, Country, IPAddress, Application, UserAgent, SessionId;
let SuspectRules =
    CloudAppEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("New-InboxRule","Set-InboxRule","UpdateInboxRules","Set-Mailbox")
    | extend Raw = tostring(RawEventData)
    | where Raw has_any ("ForwardTo","RedirectTo","ForwardingSmtpAddress","DeleteMessage")
        or Raw has_any ("RSS Feeds","RSS Subscriptions","Deleted Items","Junk Email","Conversation History")
    | project RuleTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn=AccountId, ActionType, Raw, IPAddress;
SuspectLogins
| join kind=inner (SuspectRules) on AccountUpn
| where (RuleTime - LoginTime) between (0min .. 60min)
| project LoginTime, RuleTime, AccountUpn, Country, LoginIP=IPAddress, RuleIP=IPAddress1, Application, UserAgent, ActionType, Raw
| extend HuntNote = "Possible Silent Librarian / TA407 mailbox-rule exfiltration"
| order by LoginTime desc
ucs.rationale: Mandiant/Secureworks reporting on COBALT DICKENS and the 2018/2020 DOJ Mabna Institute indictments specifically describe the operators logging into compromised faculty mailboxes and configuring auto-forwarding to exfiltrate academic research. Pairing an IRGC-adjacent geography sign-in with an inbox-rule mutation within a 60-minute window is a high-specificity behavioural signature of THIS actor; b
